landing.heroSubtitle: Trade USDT with real people in Cameroon using MTN Mobile Money, Orange Money, or QuataPay — every trade locked in escrow until you're paid.

steps.title: How a trade stays safe
steps.s1Body: When a trade opens, the seller's USDT is locked. Neither side can move it until the deal completes.
steps.s2Body: The buyer pays the seller with MoMo, Orange Money, or QuataPay, then submits proof in the trade room.
steps.s3Body: Once the seller confirms the money landed, escrow releases the crypto to the buyer — minus a small fee.

offers.title: Every offer shows the trader's track record
offers.subtitle: Completed trades, completion rate, verification, and accepted payment methods — the numbers that matter, before you commit.
offers.example: Illustrative examples — real offers appear once you sign in.

trust.title: Safety in every trade
trust.f1Body: A screenshot isn't money — escrow is. Funds stay locked until the seller confirms payment.
trust.f2Body: Identity verification, transaction PINs, and 2FA protect your account and your funds.
trust.f3Body: If something goes wrong, escrow freezes and a real person reviews the evidence.
trust.f4Body: Pick the offer, price, and payment method that work for you. No order book, no surprises.

cta.title: Ready to trade with confidence?
cta.body: Create your account in minutes. Crypto to cash. Protected.

footer.tagline: Crypto to cash. Protected. A P2P USDT marketplace with escrow, built for Central Africa.
footer.disclaimer: Crypto assets are volatile. Trade responsibly.

howItWorks.heroSubtitle: QuataTrade is a peer-to-peer marketplace. You trade directly with another person, and escrow holds the crypto until the deal is done.
howItWorks.buyStep1Body: Browse sellers by price and payment method, and open a trade for the amount you want.
howItWorks.buyStep2Body: The seller's USDT is locked in escrow the moment your trade opens.
howItWorks.buyStep3Body: Pay the seller with MoMo, Orange Money, or QuataPay, then submit your reference and details.
howItWorks.buyStep4Body: When the seller confirms your payment, escrow releases the USDT to your wallet.
howItWorks.sellStep1Body: Set your rate, limits, and which payment methods you accept.
howItWorks.sellStep2Body: When a buyer opens a trade, your USDT for that amount locks automatically.
howItWorks.sellStep3Body: The buyer pays you off-platform and submits proof in the trade room.
howItWorks.sellStep4Body: Confirm the money is in YOUR account, then release. Escrow sends the crypto to the buyer minus the fee.
howItWorks.escrowBody: Escrow means the seller's crypto is held safely until they confirm your payment landed. If there's a problem, either side can open a dispute — escrow freezes and a real person reviews the evidence. A screenshot is not money; the seller's confirmation is what releases funds.
howItWorks.escrowLink: Read the full trade & escrow rules →

security.heroSubtitle: Security is built into how QuataTrade works — not bolted on. Here are the real controls, in plain language.
security.card1Body: The seller's crypto is locked until they confirm payment. No trade releases funds automatically without that confirmation.
security.card2Body: Two-factor authentication and a separate transaction PIN are required to withdraw or release funds.
security.card3Body: Most funds are held in cold storage under the operator's hardware keys. Only a small operational float is kept online, with strict caps.
security.card4Body: The website never holds spending keys. Withdrawals are signed by an isolated service with independent caps — so a compromised website cannot drain funds.
security.card5Body: Identity verification (KYC) and deterministic risk checks help keep fraudsters out. Every verification is reviewed by a person.
security.card6Body: Every sensitive action is written to an append-only, hash-chained audit log, and balances are tracked on a double-entry ledger that reconciles against the blockchain.
security.staySafeTitle: What you can do to stay safe
security.staySafe1: Turn on 2FA and set a transaction PIN in your security center.
security.staySafe2: Confirm the money is in YOUR own account before releasing a trade — a screenshot is not proof.
security.staySafe3: Only pay from an account in your own name, and never trade for someone else.
security.staySafe4: Double-check the address and network (USDT on TRON / TRC20) before withdrawing.

fees.title: Simple, published fees
fees.subtitle: One small trading fee per completed trade, taken in crypto. No hidden charges, ever.
fees.exampleMid1: from a seller via MTN MoMo at 0.50%. The fee is
fees.exampleEnd: once the seller confirms your payment. The fee is taken from the trade in crypto — you never pay a separate charge.
fees.bullet1: No account, deposit, or listing fees.
fees.bullet2: No fee on cancelled or expired trades — escrow simply returns to the seller.
fees.bullet3: Withdrawals pay the blockchain (TRON) network fee only; it is shown before you confirm.
fees.bullet4: The fee you see before opening a trade is the fee you pay.

help.noteBody: ~30 short articles across these categories for launch. The questions below are a starting set.
help.faq1Q: What is escrow and why is it safe?
help.faq1A: Escrow locks the seller's crypto until they confirm your payment. Neither side can move the funds until the trade completes or a dispute is resolved — so a buyer can't take crypto without paying, and a seller can't take payment without releasing crypto.
help.faq2Q: Which crypto and network does QuataTrade support?
help.faq2A: At launch, USDT on the TRON network (TRC20). Always send and withdraw using this network — other networks can cause permanent loss.
help.faq3Q: How long do I have to pay for a trade?
help.faq3A: When you open a trade, a payment timer starts. Pay the seller and submit proof before it runs out, or the trade auto-cancels and the crypto returns to the seller.
help.faq4Q: The seller isn't releasing my crypto. What do I do?
help.faq4A: First, make sure you submitted your payment reference and details. If the seller still hasn't confirmed, open a dispute from the trade room — escrow freezes and a person reviews the evidence.
help.faq5A: No. Trading fees are published on the Fees page (0.3%–0.5% per method) and shown before you open a trade. Withdrawals pay only the blockchain network fee, shown before you confirm.
help.faqEmpty: Answers are on the way — check back soon.

contact.title: We’re here to help
contact.subtitle: For a problem with a specific trade, open a dispute from the trade room. For anything else, reach us here.
contact.emailNote: Best for account and general help.
contact.fraudWarning: Never share your password, PIN, or 2FA codes — QuataTrade staff will never ask for them.
contact.toWireBody: an in-app support ticket form (the platform has a notifications/ticket surface to connect). Until then this page routes users to the support email above.
contact.formSubtitle: We'll reply to your email. Never share your password, PIN, or wallet keys.
contact.successBody: Thanks — we'll reply to your email soon.

about.heroTitle: Crypto to cash, built for Central Africa
about.intro1: QuataTrade is the safest way in Central Africa to turn crypto into cash and cash into crypto — person to person, in the payment apps you already use, with every trade protected by escrow until you're paid.
about.intro2: We built QuataTrade because sending and receiving crypto shouldn't mean trusting a stranger blindly. Escrow, verified identities, and human dispute review make peer-to-peer trading feel safe — without a bank in the middle and without a centralized exchange holding your money.
about.supplyBody: company mission, founding story, team or leadership details, and any milestones you want on this page (kept lean is fine).
about.value1Body: Escrow on every trade, and funds held safely until the deal is done.
about.value2Body: You trade with real people, at your rate, in your payment method.
about.value3Body: A clean, fast, modern experience made for how people actually pay here.
about.legalPrefix: Company details and legal identity are on our
